edgeCases: No-JS path: reveal animations are gated behind an html.js class added only by the script, so every section renders fully opaque without JavaScript.
Reduced motion: all animation lives inside @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference); base styles are static and the script does not add the js class when reduce is set.
Missing demo.gif: img has meaningful alt + reserved width/height box, so a 404 shows alt text without layout shift and throws no JS error.
Value prop arrows/'enforced' are wrapped in spans for color; the element textContent still collapses to the exact canonical string.
Inline SVG data-URI favicon (shield+eye) used instead of copying the 977 KB logo.png, keeping web/ self-contained and lean.
OG/Twitter meta use absolute https://samuelnp.github.io/centinela/ URLs so social cards resolve off-host.
